examples: Punches must land on enemies' jaws.
The guide slowly led through the pass's jaws.
The calf has two lower jaws, but only one mouth.
An onyx-winged cormorant arced downward, diving below the inky water while a hippo yawned its tusky jaws.
After the movie Jaws, sharks are perceived as ferocious predators aggressively devouring innocent swimmers.
